overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a gritty urban alley system. The player moves from a narrow mural-lined passage through a commercial billboard district, into a dark covered underpass with neon advertisements, and finally emerges near a storefront called Hooch Heaven. The environment features cyberpunk aesthetics with mixed old and new architecture, vibrant neon signage, and detailed urban decay.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with graffiti murals and utility infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow urban alley with graffiti-covered walls and trash bins

entered.detail: large wall mural with yellow V logo and red floral design on white clapboard building
row of green metal trash bins lined against the wall
tall red brick residential building with green window frames
white clapboard building with metal fire escape stairs
tangled network of black power lines crossing between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed alley with a prominent yellow V mural on the left wall. The camera moves forward past green dumpsters and between tall buildings, with overhead power lines crisscrossing above. The environment is sunlit with sharp shadows, featuring a mix of red brick and white wooden architecture typical of a dense urban cyberpunk setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial alley with digital billboards and derelict vehicles

events.description: exits narrow mural alley into wider commercial district with large digital billboards
slight left turn while approaching the dark underpass entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through a commercial alleyway lined with digital advertisements and derelict vehicles, approaching a covered passage

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screens displaying various commercials on building facades
derelict car with rust and damage parked along the alley wall
elevated green metal walkway connecting buildings across the alley
tall contemporary building with reflective glass facade towering over the alley
dark tunnel entrance leading to a covered pedestrian passage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wider commercial alley as the camera leaves the narrow passage behind. Large digital billboards illuminate the walls while an abandoned vehicle sits parked on the right. A green pedestrian bridge spans the alley overhead, and the camera turns slightly left toward a dark underpass entrance in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with stairs and neon advertisements

events.description: enters covered underpass passage transitioning from natural to artificial lighting
begins ascending concrete stairs through the covered passage

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs through a dark covered passage illuminated by neon advertisements

entered.detail: concrete overhead covering creating a tunnel effect with artificial lighting
flight of concrete stairs leading upward through the passage
purple vending machine with glowing red cross symbol
large illuminated advertisement for Sweet Speed 2 with green neon lighting
yellow and red signage for Hooch Heaven store visible at the passage exit

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark covered underpass where natural light gives way to artificial neon illumination. The path leads up a flight of concrete stairs flanked by glowing advertisements, including a prominent Sweet Speed 2 billboard. The enclosed space features concrete walls and ceiling, with the Hooch Heaven sign visible as a bright spot at the far end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial alley with liquor store and pedestrian activity

events.description: exits dark underpass back into sunlit open alley

agents.ego_description: approaching a group of NPCs sitting on steps outside the Hooch Heaven storefront

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on concrete steps outside the Hooch Heaven store

entered.detail: commercial storefront with yellow Hooch Heaven signage and red window frames
tall red brick industrial building with multiple windows
metal construction scaffolding along the left building facade
concrete steps leading up to the store entrance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark underpass into bright sunlight, the scene reveals the Hooch Heaven storefront on the right with its distinctive yellow signage. Two NPCs sit on the concrete steps outside the store. The alley continues between a red industrial building on the left and the storefront, with metal scaffolding visible further down the passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunlit, narrow alleyway through a dark neon underpass and back into the bright urban light. It begins by moving past a yellow V mural and green dumpsters between tall buildings under a web of overhead power lines. As the passage opens into a wider commercial district, the camera glides past large digital billboards and an abandoned vehicle before turning toward a dark underpass entrance beneath a green pedestrian bridge. The scene then shifts into a dim, enclosed tunnel where natural light is replaced by glowing neon advertisements, leading the camera up concrete stairs toward the distant light of a storefront. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into brilliant sunlight, revealing the yellow signage of Hooch Heaven and NPCs resting on the steps beside a red industrial building.
